titleStmt.title: SII 37.553: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 553. (A.R. No. B 55 of 1943-44.) Lingāla, hamlet of Jūṭūru, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Nandi-pillar in the field known as basavannapāḍu on the way to Jūṭūru from Lingāla.
This is dated Śaka 1214 Nandana, Phālguṇa śu. 15, Sunday corresponding to 1293 A.D., February 22.

It registers grant of lands made by Rācha Rudradēva, son of Mahāsāmanta Cheṟaku Vēlūri Bollaya Reḍḍi to god Mallikārjuna for the Paṁchamṛita-mahāpūja and mahānaivēdya and worship of the god and for the maintaining the (sattras) charity homes on the occasion of the former's visit to Śriśailam for the Vasanta-mahōtsava of the god. The gift lands which were situated in Kaṁnāḍu were made over to the Kalmaṭha and entrusted to Paramaśivāchārya, the pontiff of the maṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda
mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Anuma
koṁḍa puravarādhīśvara
kākatīyya pratāparudra dē
vamahārājulu Oruṁga
ṭamodali paṭṭaṇamugānu su
kha saṁkathā vinōdaṁbulaṁbri
dhvi rājyamu sēyucuṁḍagā
svasti śrī śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 121
4gu naṁdana saṁvatsara phālguṇa
śu 15 Ā . nāṁḍu svasti śrī śrī
pa¨rvvata śrīsvayaṁbhu śrīliṁga
cakravatri śrīmalikā¨rjuna
mahāliṁgadēvuni vasaṁtama
hōtsavānaku svasti śrīmanma
hāsāmaṁta ceṟaku vēlūri
bollayareḍḍivāri koḍuku rā
ca rudradēvaniṁgāru vacci pra
tāparudradēva mahārā
julakuṁ tamataṁḍri bollayare
ḍḍivārikiṁ tamakuṁ puṇyamu
gānu śrīmallikā¨rjuna mahā
liṁga dēvuni paṁcāmṛtānnamu
nakuṁ mahāpūjakuṁ mahā
naivēdyānakuṁ raṁgabhōgānaku
satra bhikṣālakuṁ naikalmaṭhādhipa
tulaina śrīmatu paramaśivā
cā¨ryulacētanu svahastōdaka
dhārāpū¨rvvakamugānu śrī
mallināthadēvuni saṁnidhiyaṁ
du kalmaṭhamuna kiccina datti

kaṁnāṭi lōpalanu
juvvuṭūri polamulō
nu rēgaḍu jēnu kha 10
puṭṭaṁ Isukāla ma
luṁ gūḍūri manya polaṁ
nu kaṁbhālapalli mānya polaṁ
nu śaramulapalli Eḍavō
muṁ Isukāla modalaina
ṭhamu Ūḍla Āyasuṁka
mu Aṣṭhabhōga sahitamugā
nu Icciri . svadattā dviguṇaṁ
puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ
niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vā yō harēta va
suṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .]
madvaṁśajāḥ paramahīpati vaṁ
śajāvā pāpāpīta manasā
bhuvi bhūmipālāḥ . tē pāla
yaṁtu mama dha¨rmmamiyaṁ
samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mayāvi
racitāṁjali śēṣamā¨rdhnā .
Digital edition of SII 37.553 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
